justifications.clarity: Prose flows naturally from regulatory context through modelling to governance; the Apple Card anecdote and CFPB study provide concrete grounding before each technical section.
justifications.rigor: All key claims are supported by formal definitions or citations (Altman Z-score, LoRA factorisation, SHAP axioms, Platt scaling MLE); the MNAR section correctly flags bias in standard imputation but does not name a specific sensitivity analysis method.
justifications.completeness: All eight learning objectives are substantively addressed; all six chapter sections appear in the notes; worked examples are present for class weighting, serialisation, the Maria/Thomas persona contrast, and SHAP waterfall.
justifications.pedagogy: Eight clear learning objectives stated at the outset; motivation precedes every technical concept; new terms defined before first use; BOOK-ONLY flag correctly marks the Gini CAP-curve proof.
justifications.style: Notation is consistent throughout; a few list-heavy passages in Sections 4 and 6 could be rendered in prose for more natural reading, but overall voice is clear and direct.
